svg.text: chair · laptop · table · tv · keyboard · mouse · book
→ better domain match for meeting rooms
no role · no speaker · bbox only
attends to image + text → generates output
W' = W + BA where B∈ℝ^(d×r), A∈ℝ^(r×d)
W frozen · only A and B trained
best checkpoint loaded at end of training
Finetuning on COCO teaches bbox format, but
also corrupts the model's zero-shot reasoning.
→ LoRA model does what it was trained for:
find people and locate them precisely
→ Base model does what it's already good at:
reason about roles and speaker from context
COCO images often have 10-20+ people → model
learned "keep outputting entries" without strong stop
② filter training to ≤6 people per image
③ add explicit </end> stop token in training data
COCO 2017 · indoor-filtered · rank-16 LoRA · 3 epochs · lr=2e-4 cosine · bfloat16 · gradient checkpointing
